title: Wedding Toast Gone Wrong
text:
## Wedding Toast Gone Wrong

Ladies and gentlemen, I am {person}, the bride's {adjective} {job}.

I first met the couple at a {adjective} {place} while {verb ending in -ing} near the {object}.

**Advice:** Never {verb} before {number} PM, and always wear a {color} {clothing item} to family dinners.

**Memory:** The groom once {past-tense verb} a {animal} during a {adjective} vacation.

**Closing:** May your love be as {adjective} as {food} and as loud as a {sound}.

Please raise your glass and {verb} responsibly.
